# Web Scraper Tool

A web scraper tool to extract data from e-commerce websites using Python, BeautifulSoup, and Selenium.

## Installation

```bash
pip install web-scraper-tool

modules.name: utils
documentation: This package contains utility functions for the web scraper tool.
